notes: All formal assertions passed for both with-skill and baseline runs, so this first eval set is not very discriminating.

The most useful qualitative difference appears in eval 4: the baseline noticed blog-article as the repo post type, while the with-skill report says its script defaults to post. Review the generated scripts before revising the skill.
Timing/token metrics were not available from the visible completion notifications, so benchmark timing is set to 0 and output_chars are stored per run only.
Next iteration should add harder evals that require the skill helpers or test cross-project/monorepo env discovery more directly.
